message:
chore(deps): add `dirs` crate to mcp-agent-mail-server

Add the `dirs` crate as a dependency of the mcp-agent-mail-server
package (v0.2.6). This crate provides platform-specific standard
directory paths (home, config, cache, data, etc.) and is commonly
used to resolve user-facing paths in a cross-platform manner.

The Cargo.lock change is a single line addition inserting `dirs`
into the alphabetically-sorted dependency list of mcp-agent-mail-server,
between `criterion` and `fastmcp-core`. No other transitive dependency
changes occurred, indicating `dirs` and its transitive deps were already
present in the lock file from other workspace members.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
